stemHtml: Under Part-FCL, how is the term "rating" defined?

options.a: An entry on a licence that sets out the privileges, special conditions, or limitations associated with it.
options.b: A classification according to grade, based on comparative assessment of quality, entered on a licence.
options.c: A designated operating privilege based on specified conditions.
options.d: A measure of pilot performance indicating the level achieved and documenting the skills the pilot may exercise under the licence.
